upstream.description: Local SwiftUI/macOS documentation crawler and retrieval layer.
upstream.git_commit_subject: updated the plan to match what shipped
upstream.working_tree_untracked_note: Untracked files were outside swiftui-macos-corpus/ and are not part of this snapshot.

notes: Truth for integrity verification lives in manifest.txt (per-file sha256) and manifest.json (summary + aggregate hash).

The upstream git commit is a pointer for provenance only — re-cloning upstream at that commit does NOT reproduce this snapshot verbatim, because the commit does not track the crawled corpus files. Use manifest.txt to verify a local copy.
